overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring Aloy traversing a foggy coastal environment at night. The character runs along rocky trails through dense tropical vegetation, transitions onto a sandy beach, and approaches torch-lit ancient ruins with a distinctive teal color grade and atmospheric mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal trail through tropical forest

events.description: on-screen text 'Discovered KITH SHIELDWALL SITE' appears in upper right corner

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the uneven rocky coastal path surrounded by dense tropical vegetation

entered.detail: uneven dirt and stone trail winding along the coastline
dense jungle with palm trees and thick undergrowth
mist-covered peaks visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running along a narrow rocky coastal trail at night, surrounded by dense tropical forest on both sides. The atmosphere is misty with a cool teal color grade, and the path winds through moderate vegetation with foggy mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: terrain transitions from rocky trail to sandy beach with torch-lit ruins becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: pushing through dense coastal bushes and vegetation while descending toward the beach area

entered.detail: open beach area with white sand visible through the vegetation
ancient wooden structure illuminated by burning torches
large boulders and rocky outcrops along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: Moving through increasingly dense coastal vegetation, the path descends toward the beach. The torch-lit ruins become visible in the distance as the terrain transitions from rocky trail to sandy ground, with coastal rocks appearing on the right.

events.description: character dialogue appears: 'Okay. Time to cross the water and look for Landfall... and Alva.'
approaching the torch-lit ruins creates warm orange glow on the sand and character

agents.ego_description: walking across the sandy beach toward the illuminated ruins while mission dialogue plays

entered.detail: dilapidated hut with broken windows and overgrown vines
burning torch mounted on a tall wooden pole casting warm light
calm sea visible beyond the beach with dark horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open beach, Aloy walks across white sand toward the torch-lit ruins. Dialogue appears indicating a mission objective, and the lighting shifts from cool teal to warm orange as the character approaches the burning torches of the ancient structure.

events.description: character dialogue appears: 'No one here. That's strange.' noting the absence of expected NPCs

agents.ego_description: circling around the ruins and examining the empty beach area for clues or items

entered.detail: rusted cylindrical containers scattered near the ruins
stacked rock piles marking the beach area
scattered planks and rubble from the ruined structure

segments.scene_description: Aloy circles around the ruins, moving past metal barrels and stone cairns while exploring the empty beach. The torch light now dominates the illumination, casting long shadows on the sand as the character investigates the abandoned area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty tropical forest that gradually descends toward a torch-lit coastal ruin. It begins with Aloy running along a narrow rocky trail at night, surrounded by dense vegetation under a cool teal atmospheric haze with foggy mountains looming in the distance. As the camera follows her forward, the path winds through increasingly thick coastal greenery, causing the terrain to slope downward. The scene then shifts from the rocky trail to sandy ground, with coastal rocks appearing on the right as the environment opens up. Finally, the movement leads toward the shoreline where the distant glow of torch-lit ruins emerges through the mist.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character emerges from a cool, misty environment onto a torch-lit beach. It begins with Aloy walking across white sand toward ancient ruins, where the lighting shifts from a cool teal grade to a warm orange glow as she approaches the burning torches. As she reaches the structure, the scene expands to show her circling the ruins, moving past metal barrels and stone cairns scattered across the empty shoreline. The torchlight then becomes the dominant source of illumination, casting long, flickering shadows across the sand as the character investigates the abandoned area.
